narrative:
Precinct Harrison E (precinct in Scioto County) has 467 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
